name: brita
description: Rotinas — PWA local-first de rotinas, notas e tarefas

scripts.copy:www: rm -rf www && mkdir www && cp index.html manifest.json sw.js icon-192.png icon-512.png icon-512-maskable.png www/ && cp -R fonts www/fonts
scripts.apk: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo 'APK em android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'
